title: Re: Toy distributions in goodnesses-of-fit changing between Combine tags version 8.1 and 8.2

posts.name: Adinda de Wit
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Dear Robert,
Did you try the toy generation with --X-rtd MINIMIZER_no_analytic as
well? Perhaps this is causing the difference. If you've tried that and
it isn't the source of the difference, please provide a minimum working
example datacard that reproduces the issue, so that we can have a look.
Best,
Adinda
posts.cooked_html:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination

Dear Robert,

Did you try the toy generation with --X-rtd MINIMIZER_no_analytic as
well? Perhaps this is causing the difference. If you've tried that and
it isn't the source of the difference, please provide a minimum working
example datacard that reproduces the issue, so that we can have a look.

Best,
Adinda
